<!-- indicator: fig-clrd-hospital-aar -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-clrd-hospital-aar
#| fig-cap: 'Chronic Lower Respiratory Disease Hospitalization, Age-Adjusted Rate per 10,000 Population, 2020–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Chronic Lower Respiratory Disease Hospitalization, Age-Adjusted Rate per 10,000 Population, 2020–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-clrd-hospital-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
